assertions.assertion: Output contains a call to builder.Services.AddIdentityServer with an options lambda
assertions.rationale: Response contains 'builder.Services.AddIdentityServer(options =>' with an options lambda.

assertions.assertion: Output enables all four event types: RaiseErrorEvents, RaiseInformationEvents, RaiseFailureEvents, RaiseSuccessEvents all set to true
assertions.rationale: All four event types are set to true in the options lambda.

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddInMemoryIdentityResources with at least IdentityResources.OpenId() and IdentityResources.Profile()
assertions.rationale: Response calls .AddInMemoryIdentityResources with OpenId() and Profile().

assertions.assertion: Output calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'weatherapi'
assertions.rationale: Response calls .AddInMemoryApiScopes with new ApiScope("weatherapi", "Weather API").

assertions.assertion: Output calls app.UseIdentityServer() and does NOT separately call app.UseAuthentication()
assertions.rationale: Response calls both app.UseAuthentication() and app.UseIdentityServer() separately. The assertion requires UseIdentityServer() without a separate UseAuthentication() call.
